summary: Integrated ADR 0232 from the rebased latest-origin/main worktree by replaying the private Nomad scheduler through the guarded production entrypoint, recording the ADR 0191 in-place mutation exception for monitoring-lv3, and re-verifying controller access, service placement, and durable batch execution on the live platform.

verification.check: Immutable guest replacement plan for Nomad
verification.observed: `make immutable-guest-replacement-plan service=nomad` confirmed that `monitoring-lv3` remains governed by ADR 0191 immutable guest replacement with classification `edge_and_stateful`, validation mode `preview_guest`, rollback window `180m`, and a narrow exception rule that allows in-place mutation only for documented emergency or reversible changes.

verification.check: Guarded live-apply wrapper blocks without override
verification.observed: `make live-apply-service service=nomad env=production` passed canonical-truth, interface-contract, standby-capacity, and service-redundancy preflights, then failed closed at the immutable guest replacement guard with `Immutable guest replacement is required before in-place live apply: nomad -> monitoring-lv3 [classification=edge_and_stateful, validation=preview_guest, rollback=180m]`. The same preflight also reported `nomad: declared R1 -> platform R1 -> implemented R0 [gate=unproven]` because no recorded R1 rehearsal proof exists yet.

verification.check: Latest-origin/main guarded live apply with documented ADR 0191 exception
verification.observed: Earlier in this rebased integration worktree, `make live-apply-service service=nomad env=production ALLOW_IN_PLACE_MUTATION=true` completed successfully and fully replayed the private Nomad service. The final play recap was `docker-build-lv3 ok=82 changed=5 failed=0`, `docker-runtime-lv3 ok=92 changed=3 failed=0`, `localhost ok=12 changed=0 failed=0`, `monitoring-lv3 ok=98 changed=2 failed=0`, and `proxmox_florin ok=52 changed=7 failed=0`.

verification.check: Controller proxy and cluster readiness after integrated replay
verification.observed: `curl -sS https://100.64.0.1:8013/v1/status/leader --cacert /Users/live/Documents/GITHUB_PROJECTS/proxmox_florin_server/.local/nomad/tls/nomad-agent-ca.pem -H "X-Nomad-Token: ..."` returned `"10.10.10.40:4647"`, and `/v1/nodes` through the same proxy reported `docker-runtime-lv3 ready runtime` plus `docker-build-lv3 ready build`.

verification.check: Smoke service and durable batch proof after integrated replay
verification.observed: `ANSIBLE_HOST_KEY_CHECKING=False ansible -i inventory/hosts.yml monitoring-lv3 -m shell -a 'sudo systemctl is-active lv3-nomad && sudo /usr/local/bin/lv3-nomad job status lv3-nomad-smoke-service' --private-key /Users/live/Documents/GITHUB_PROJECTS/proxmox_florin_server/.local/ssh/hetzner_llm_agents_ed25519 -e proxmox_guest_ssh_connection_mode=proxmox_host_jump` returned `active`, `Status = running`, and deployment `successful`; `ANSIBLE_HOST_KEY_CHECKING=False ansible -i inventory/hosts.yml docker-build-lv3 -m shell -a 'systemctl is-active lv3-nomad && curl -fsS http://10.10.10.30:18180/' --private-key /Users/live/Documents/GITHUB_PROJECTS/proxmox_florin_server/.local/ssh/hetzner_llm_agents_ed25519 -e proxmox_guest_ssh_connection_mode=proxmox_host_jump` returned `active` and `lv3 nomad smoke service`; and `ANSIBLE_HOST_KEY_CHECKING=False ansible -i inventory/hosts.yml docker-runtime-lv3 -m shell -a 'systemctl is-active lv3-nomad && sudo cat /var/lib/nomad/verification/lv3-nomad-smoke-batch/last-run.log' --private-key /Users/live/Documents/GITHUB_PROJECTS/proxmox_florin_server/.local/ssh/hetzner_llm_agents_ed25519 -e proxmox_guest_ssh_connection_mode=proxmox_host_jump` returned `active`, `adr-0232-live-apply batch verification`, and timestamp `2026-03-28T21:07:33+00:00`.

notes: The earlier branch-local receipt remains preserved as the first isolated-worktree live apply, but this mainline-equivalent receipt is the canonical evidence for the release and platform-version updates that follow on current main.

This integrated replay intentionally used `ALLOW_IN_PLACE_MUTATION=true` as the documented ADR 0191 narrow exception because `nomad` is hosted on `monitoring-lv3`, which also carries other R1 monitoring services. The default path for future production changes to that guest remains immutable replacement.

The follow-on release step updates `VERSION`, `changelog.md`, `README.md`, `RELEASE.md`, `docs/release-notes/*`, `versions/stack.yaml`, `build/platform-manifest.json`, and the ADR/workstream metadata to record ADR 0232 in repository version 0.177.52 and platform version 0.130.43.
